case_title: ROBERT GMELIN VS. FAIRMONT HOTEL MANAGEMENT COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GMELIN, ROBERT SERVED FEB-07-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FAIRMONT HOTEL MANAGEMENT COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION, 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF ROBERT GMELIN'S MOTION FOR AN APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER FOR LEAVE PERMITTING THE FILING OF A FIRST AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT SUBSTITUTING DEFENDANT'S TRUE NAME FOR A FICTITIOUS NAME IS OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO PROVIDE SUFFICIENT NOTICE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CCP 1005 OR OBTAIN AN ORDER SHORTENING TIME. THE MOTION WAS FILED AND SERVED ON MARCH 5, 2014. THE COURT NOTED THAT IT WILL ENTERTAIN THIS APPLICATION ON THE EX PARTE CALENDAR. IN ADDITION, PLAINTIFF WAS INSTRUCTED TO APPEAR IN PERSON AT THE EX PARTE HEARING. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Application For An Order For Leave Permitting The Filing Of A First Amendment To Complaint Substituting Deft'S True Name For A Fictitious Name
Off Calendar Mar-12-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Scott Montgomery, Esq. of Abbey Weitzenberg Warren & Emery, Tel. 707.542.5050, for plaintiff and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ROBERT GMELIN's Motion For An Application For An Order For Leave Permitting The Filing Of A First Amendment To Complaint Substituting Defendant's True Name For A Fictitious Name is off calendar. The moving party failed to provide sufficient notice in compliance with CCP 1005 or obtain an order shortening time. The motion was filed and served on March 5, 2014. The Court noted that it will entertain this application on the ex parte calendar. In addition, plaintiff was instructed to appear in person at the ex parte hearing. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
